meaning: n.财产,所有物,相关事物,亲戚
examples: All his belongings were burnt in the fire.
They dumped his belongings unceremoniously on the floor.
Shabazz was beaten while another man was threatened and stripped of his belongings, Rios said.
Sharon and Joel Edelson handed in a small mother-of -pearl knife, found among her late father-in-laws belongings.
